description: Blending textured suede with plush two tones, these Timerband boots are designed for comfort under extreme conditions. High top styling with stitch detail is a sartorial reference to the spirit of the adventurous. Wear these with form fitting denims and a dark formal shirt.UpperHigh-top leather upper with strategically placed overlay at the heelCentral lace ups with metal eyeletsPadded tongue for comfortPadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, a curved midfoot and a stacked  heelshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
